map.message: $(string.map_Srv2ConnectionDisconnectReasonsThe connection was idle and timed out.)
$(string.map_Srv2SmbSessionCloseReasonsThe server closed the session due to it idling past the AutoDisconnectTimeout time.)
$(string.map_Srv2SmbSessionCloseReasonsThe server closed the session due to it being forcibly closed.)
$(string.map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsServer can't set bidi stream count for the connection.)
$(string.map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsThe client certificate validation by Schannel failed.)
$(string.map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsThe client certificate access check RPC failed.)
$(string.map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsQUIC returned an error during the asynchronous client certificate validation.)
$(string.map_Smb2DirectDataPlacementSecurityMapSecurity Transforms Enabled (Except For Shares Enabled With Isolated Transport))

string.id: map_Srv2ConnectionDisconnectReasonsThe connection was idle and timed out.
string.value: The connection was idle and timed out.

string.id: map_Srv2SmbSessionCloseReasonsThe server closed the session due to it idling past the AutoDisconnectTimeout time.
string.value: The server closed the session due to it idling past the AutoDisconnectTimeout time.

string.id: map_Srv2SmbSessionCloseReasonsThe server closed the session due to it being forcibly closed.
string.value: The server closed the session due to it being forcibly closed.

string.id: map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsServer can't create a new connection.
string.value: Server can't create a new connection.

string.id: map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsServer can't set bidi stream count for the connection.
string.value: Server can't set bidi stream count for the connection.

string.id: map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsServer can't get the local address.
string.value: Server can't get the local address.

string.id: map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsThe client certificate validation by Schannel failed.
string.value: The client certificate validation by Schannel failed.

string.id: map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsThe client certificate access check failed.
string.value: The client certificate access check failed.

string.id: map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsThe client certificate access check RPC failed.
string.value: The client certificate access check RPC failed.

string.id: map_SrvnetQuicShutdownReasonsQUIC returned an error during the asynchronous client certificate validation.
string.value: QUIC returned an error during the asynchronous client certificate validation.

string.id: map_Smb2DirectDataPlacementSecurityMapSecurity Transforms Enabled (Except For Shares Enabled With Isolated Transport)
string.value: Security Transforms Enabled (Except For Shares Enabled With Isolated Transport)
